title: [CODEREVIEW-6 pass 3] Missing vendor in board.yml and no variant yaml files
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/board.yml:2 - lacks vendor: elecrow line present in other boards. No *procpu.yaml and *appcpu.yaml files like in heltec and t_deck boards for full registration with twister/west. This may explain why west boards does not list it. P2 registration issue.
close_reason: Fixed board.yml (vendor, no-nested variants list with cpucluster), added elecrow_thinknode_m7_{procpu,appcpu}.yaml, ensured Kconfig selects SOC_ESP32S3_FN8 matching dtsi, updated Kconfig.defconfig BOARD_*_ESP32S3_* symbols + heap/PoE defaults. Ran codereview 3x per chunk (no new findings after pass 3). west boards now lists variants; builds clean. All codereview beads closed.
